title: 7 Days 2 Mine
description: 7 Days 2 Mine is a hardcore survival modpack inspired by 7 Days to Die, focused on urban exploration, brutal combat, and long-term survival. Resources are scarce, zombies are dangerous, and every night is a real threat.
body:
A private modpack inspired by 7 Days to Die, focused on survival, exploration and harder gameplay.
This pack combines zombies, base-building, tougher nights and progression elements to recreate the feeling of 7DTD inside Minecraft.
Made for personal use only — not intended for public release.
